summary: EXP-101 complete: Major rewrite of WIN-068 detail_evidence and detail_verdict_text to match Self-Contradicted verdict. Added refraction cascade argument (sun altitude indeterminacy across 39 eclipses), FSF/H(r) connection to 2026 eclipse predictions, preemptive defense against apparent-vs-physical shadow objection. Preserved existing Chapman mechanism and post-hoc content. Finding and TLDRs were already patched by decider. Note: cross-WIN inconsistency with WIN-025 remains (ISS-789, pending-human).
